title: spergularia marginata subsp. intermedia
intro: Spergularia marginata subsp. intermedia, also known as Intermediate Sandspurry, is a subspecies of annual plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Spergularia marginata subsp. intermedia are said to include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant have not been extensively scientifically studied.
